steps.title: Find the scope signal
steps.content: The opening phrase, “Women like Eleanor May Brooks,” signals through its plural structure and use of “like” that the topic is women in cryptology (as a group), not Brooks as an individual.

steps.title: Match to the answers
steps.content: The correct answer directly names the main topic: women in the field of cryptology. B and C focus on subjects the passage doesn't address, while D treats a single supporting example as the main focus. That is the correct answer.
